AqmDisable.description: Disable AQM for this service flow

ImmediateAqmRangeExponentOfRampFunction.description: Immediate AQM range exponent of ramp function

AsfServingGroupEntry.description: ASF Serving Group encoding for aggregate service flows

ServiceFlowToAsfMatchingByTrafficPriorit.description: Match service flows to ASF by traffic priority range

AuthorizeRejectWaitTimeout.description: Time (seconds) CM waits in Authorize Reject Wait state after receiving Authorization Reject

AuthorizeWaitTimeout.description: Retransmission interval (seconds) for Authorization Request messages in Authorize Wait state

OperationalWaitTimeout.description: Retransmission interval (seconds) for Key Requests in Operational Wait state

ReauthorizeWaitTimeout.description: Retransmission interval (seconds) for Authorization Request messages in Reauthorize Wait state

RekeyWaitTimeout.description: Retransmission interval (seconds) for Key Requests in Rekey Wait state

SaMapMaxRetries.description: Maximum number of Map Request retries

SaMapWaitTimeout.description: Retransmission interval (seconds) for SA Map Requests in Map Wait state

TekGraceTime.description: Grace period (seconds) for re-keying the TEK

BgpVpnid.description: BGP VPN ID (4-byte integer identifying the L2VPN)

BufferControlEntry.description: Buffer Control encoding for service flow buffer management

ClassifierErrorEntry.description: Classifier Error Encoding reported when a classifier parameter is rejected

ErrorCode.description: Error code value (Confirmation Code per C.4)

ErroredParameter.description: Type value of the TLV in error

CmSoftwareDownloadConfigEntry.description: Cable Modem Software Download Configuration Settings sub-TLVs

CodeFileAuthenticationHeader.description: Firmware Authentication Header (FWAH) - PKCS#7 data structure (DER-encoded ASN.1)

OcspCvcResponses.description: Concatenated OCSP responses for CVC certificate validation (DER-encoded)

CmSshServerConfigurationSettingsEntry.description: CM SSH Server Configuration Settings sub-TLVs

CmInterfaceMask.description: CM Interface Mask (CMIM) bitmask for DAC-enabled interfaces

DownstreamServiceClassName.description: Downstream Service Class Name for DAC-Path service flow

UpstreamServiceClassName.description: Upstream Service Class Name for DAC-Path service flow

DocsisExtensionFieldEntry.description: DOCSIS Extension Field (TLV 43) container. When VendorId is FFFFFF (General Extension), the defined sub-TLVs apply. When VendorId is any other OUI, use VendorSubTlvs for vendor-specific sub-TLVs.

CableModemAttributeMasks.description: Cable Modem Attribute Masks (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

CmLoadBalancingGroupId.description: Load balancing group ID for the CM (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

CmLoadBalancingPolicyId.description: Load balancing policy ID assigned to the CM (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

CmLoadBalancingPriority.description: Load balancing priority for the CM (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

CmRangingClassIdExtension.description: CM Ranging Class ID Extension (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

ExtendedCmtsMicConfigurationSetting.description: Extended CMTS MIC Configuration Setting (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

IpMulticastJoinAuthorization.description: IP Multicast Join Authorization (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

ServiceTypeIdentifier.description: Service type identifier string (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

SourceAddressVerification.description: Source Address Verification (SAV) encoding (General Extension, OUI=FFFFFF)

VendorId.description: 3-byte IEEE OUI as a hexadecimal string. Use FFFFFF for General Extension Information.

VendorSubTlvs.description: Vendor-specific sub-TLVs in generic type/value form. Used when VendorId is not FFFFFF.

x-docsis-validValues.1: do not associate with resequencing DSID

IatcProfileNameReference.description: IATC profile name reference for the service flow

MaxTrafficBurst.description: Maximum traffic burst size in bytes

MespReference.description: Reference to a Metro Ethernet Service Profile

MinReservedTrafficRate.description: Minimum reserved traffic rate in bits per second

PeakTrafficRate.description: Peak traffic rate in bits per second

QosParamSetType.description: Defines which QoS parameter sets are provisioned: 7 = provisioned, admitted, and active

ServiceClassName.description: Name of the service class to use for this service flow

ServiceFlowAttributeAggregationRuleMask.description: Attribute aggregation rule mask for service flow

ServiceFlowErrorEncoding.description: Error encoding for this service flow

ServiceFlowForbiddenAttributeMask.description: Forbidden attribute mask for service flow

ServiceFlowReference.description: Unique reference for this service flow within the config file

ServiceFlowRequiredAttributeMask.description: Required attribute mask for service flow

ServiceIdentifier.description: Service Identifier (SID) for this service flow

TimeoutForActiveQosParameters.description: Timeout for active QoS parameters in seconds

TimeoutForAdmittedQosParameters.description: Timeout for admitted QoS parameters in seconds

TrafficPriority.description: Relative priority for the service flow (0-7)

x-docsis-validValues.1: ignore initialization mode TLV and keep disabled

IpMulticastConfigurationServer.description: IP Multicast Configuration Server IP address or FQDN (ASCII encoded)

RaTransmissionInterval.description: Router Advertisement transmission interval in seconds

Tr369ControllerConfiguration.description: TR-369 (USP) Controller configuration; one instance per controller

AccessViewType.description: SNMPv1v2c access view type; if absent defaults to read-only

TransportAddressAccess.description: Transport address and mask pair for SNMP access control; one or more instances allowed

ErouterSnmpv1v2cTransportAddressAccessEn.description: eRouter SNMPv1v2c Transport Address Access encoding

TransportAddress.description: SNMPv1v2c transport address (6 bytes for IPv4, 18 bytes for IPv6)

TransportAddressMask.description: SNMPv1v2c transport address mask (6 bytes for IPv4, 18 bytes for IPv6)

ErouterSnmpv3AccessViewEntry.description: eRouter SNMPv3 Access View Configuration encoding

AccessViewMask.description: SNMPv3 access view bit mask (0-16 bytes); if absent defaults to zero-length string

AccessViewSubtree.description: SNMPv3 access view subtree OID (ASN.1 encoded; defaults to 1.3.6 if absent)

AccessViewType.description: SNMPv3 access view type; if absent defaults to included

AppSigIdle.description: Application signal idle pattern — CAS signaling idle byte sent on TDM interface failure (default 0x0F)

AppSigInterval.description: Application signal interval — CAS signaling send interval in milliseconds (default 5 ms)

AppSigMaxInterval.description: Application signal maximum interval — CAS signaling refresh interval in seconds when no change (default 5 s)

AppSigTos.description: Application signal TOS — IP TOS for separate CAS signaling packet stream (default 0)

DefaultIdlePattern.description: Default idle pattern — single byte played on TDM interface on defect conditions (default 0xFF)

LFlagPolicy.description: L flag policy — action on TDM when packets received with L flag set

LopsPolicy.description: LOPS policy — pattern played on TDM while in LOPS state

RFlagPolicy.description: R flag policy — action on TDM when packets received with R flag set

RemoteDefectPolicy.description: Remote defect policy — action on TDM when L=0, M=01 indicating Remote Defect received

RtpCasPeerPt.description: RTP CAS peer signaling payload type — expected PT in peer's RTP signaling frames; non-zero validates incoming

RtpCasPt.description: RTP CAS signaling payload type — PT in RTP header of signaling frames

Dsx1CircuitId.description: dsx1 circuit ID — vendor circuit identifier for troubleshooting; should include physical port ID (1-255 bytes)

Dsx1SignalMode.description: dsx1 signal mode — signaling mode for DS0s of this physical port

Dsx1TransmitClockSource.description: dsx1 transmit clock source — compound TLV containing clock mode (14.7.1, required) and optional source reference sub-TLVs (14.7.2, 14.7.3, 14.7.4)

EteaDsx1TransmitClockSourceEntry.description: eTEA dsx1 Transmit Clock Source configuration — compound sub-TLV specifying clock mode and optional source reference

ClockMode.description: dsx1 transmit clock source mode — must always be present

InterfaceType.description: dsx1 transmit clock source interface type (0=CM port, 1=Ethernet port, 2=E1/T1 port; default 0)

PortNumber.description: dsx1 transmit clock source port number (default 1)

PwIndex.description: dsx1 transmit clock source PW index — adaptive timing source PW index

EndOfText.description: eTEA end of data marker — has no Length or value fields; presence indicates end of config file

EteaMic.description: eTEA Message Integrity Check (eTEA MIC) — 128-bit MD5 digest over config file bytes; MUST appear immediately before EndOfText

SnmpV1V2cCoexistenceCfg.description: eTEA SNMPv1v2c Coexistence Configuration — SNMP access control per DOCSIS MULPIv3.0 Annex C; eTEA uses '@eTEA' key instead of '@CM'

SnmpV3AccessViewCfg.description: eTEA SNMPv3 Access View Configuration — SNMP v3 access view per DOCSIS MULPIv3.0 Annex C

EmulationType.description: Emulation type — PW emulation mode from PW-TDM-MIB type enumeration; spec text says default t1Satop(17) but table shows e1Satop(17)/t1Satop(18); table values are authoritative

PwDescription.description: PW description — textual description of PW; optional, 1-31 bytes; zero-length string if absent

PwDestinationPort.description: PW destination port — UDP port for this PW; must be a dynamic port (49152-65535); unique per PW within an IWF

PwName.description: PW name — canonical name assigned to this PW (1-31 bytes)

PwPeerDestinationPort.description: PW peer destination port — UDP port used by peer PW; must be a dynamic port (49152-65535); may also be used as source port

PwPeerSsrc.description: PW peer SSRC — expected SSRC in incoming RTP header; non-zero validates incoming frames

EteaPwTdmCirculationMapEntry.description: eTEA PW TDM Circulation Map encoding

PwTdmPortNumber.description: PW TDM port number — physical E1/T1 port number (default 1; single-port devices may omit)

EteaPwTdmConfigurationTableEntry.description: eTEA PW TDM Configuration Table encoding

PwDefaultFillPattern.description: PW default fill pattern — single fill byte played out when a packet is lost (default 0x00)

PwExcessiveLossThreshold.description: PW excessive loss threshold — percentage threshold considered excessive packet loss

PwLFlagPayloadPolicy.description: PW L flag payload policy — whether to use or ignore payload in packets received with L bit set

PwLopsEntranceCriteria.description: PW LOPS entrance criteria — number of consecutive late/missing packets to enter LOPS state

PwLopsExitCriteria.description: PW LOPS exit criteria — number of consecutive in-sequence packets required to exit LOPS state

PwPacketReplacePolicy.description: PW packet replace policy — what to play out on TDM when a packet is lost (not in LOPS state)

PwPayloadSuppression.description: PW payload suppression — suppress payload bytes when L bit is set indicating TDM interface problem

PwRtpPayloadType.description: PW RTP payload type — payload type in RTP header of data frames

PwRtpPeerPayloadType.description: PW RTP peer payload type — expected PT in peer's RTP data frames; non-zero validates incoming frames

PwRtpPeerTimestampReference.description: PW RTP peer timestamp reference — number of clock cycles per 125 usec period used by peer

PwRtpTimestampMode.description: PW RTP timestamp mode — timestamp generation mode

PwRtpTimestampReference.description: PW RTP timestamp reference — number of clock cycles per 125 usec period (e.g. 193 for T1 1.544MHz, 256 for E1 2.048MHz)

PwSevereLossThreshold.description: PW severe loss threshold — percentage threshold considered severe packet loss

PwTos.description: PW Type of Service — IP TOS value for packets sent on this PW (default 184 = EF class, 0xB8)

FaultManagementConfigurationEntry.description: Fault Management Configuration encoding for L2VPN SOAM

EnableLinktraceMessages.description: Linktrace Function enable (receive LTM and reply with LTR)

EnableLoopbackReplyMessages.description: Loopback Function enable (receive LBM and reply with LBR)

FrameDelayMeasurementEnable.description: Frame Delay Measurement enable (receive DMM and reply with DMR)

FrameDelayMeasurementOneWayTwoWay.description: Frame Delay Measurement one-way or two-way mode

FrameDelayMeasurementTransmissionPeriodi.description: Frame Delay Measurement transmission periodicity in milliseconds (0=run once)

FrameLossMeasurementEnable.description: Frame Loss Measurement enable (receive SLM and reply with SLR)

FrameLossMeasurementTransmissionPeriodic.description: Frame Loss Measurement transmission periodicity in milliseconds (0=run once)

Ieee8021ahEncapsulationEntry.description: IEEE 802.1ah Encapsulation encoding within NSI encapsulation

DestinationBebMacAddress.description: Destination Backbone Edge Bridge MAC address (B-DA)

Ipv4TypeOfServiceRangeAndMask.description: IPv4 ToS range and mask (3 bytes)

Ipv6DestinationPrefixLength.description: IPv6 destination prefix length in bits

Ipv6SourcePrefixLength.description: IPv6 source prefix length in bits

Ipv6TrafficClass.description: IPv6 traffic class range and mask

L2vpnEncodingEntry.description: L2VPN Encoding within DOCSIS Extension Field (TLV 43.5)

DacConfiguration.description: DAC Disable/Enable Configuration (Demarc Auto-Configuration; DPoE only)

NetworkTimingProfileReference.description: Network Timing Profile reference (2 bytes; DPoE only)

PseudowireClass.description: Pseudowire class name (STRING, 1-32 bytes; DPoE only)

PseudowireType.description: Pseudowire type (1 byte; e.g., 4=Ethernet tagged mode, 5=Ethernet raw mode)

LowLatencyEncodingsEntry.description: Low Latency encodings for aggregate service flows

ClassicSfScn.description: Classic service flow service class name

LowLatencySfScn.description: Low latency service flow service class name

QueueProtectionEnable.description: Queue protection enable (bit 0 only; bits 1-7 reserved)

MepConfigurationEntry.description: MEP Configuration encoding for L2VPN SOAM

CommittedInformationRate.description: Committed Information Rate in bits per second

ExcessInformationRate.description: Excess Information Rate in bits per second

MespBpColorMarkingEntry.description: MESP Bandwidth Profile Color Marking encoding

MplsPwEntry.description: MPLS Pseudowire encoding within NSI encapsulation

PhsErrorEncoding.description: PHS error encoding (deprecated as of DOCSIS 3.1; listed in DOCSIS 1.1 table, C.2.4)

PerformanceManagementConfigurationEntry.description: Performance Management Configuration encoding for L2VPN SOAM

FrameDelayMeasurement.description: Frame Delay Measurement compound sub-TLV container

FrameLossMeasurement.description: Frame Loss Measurement compound sub-TLV container

PhsErrorEntry.description: Payload Header Suppression Error Encoding (deprecated as of DOCSIS 3.1)

ErrorCode.description: Error code value (Confirmation Code per C.4) - PHS deprecated as of DOCSIS 3.1

ErroredParameter.description: Type value of the TLV in error

RemoteMepConfigurationEntry.description: Remote MEP Configuration encoding for L2VPN SOAM

CmSoftwareDownloadConfiguration.description: Cable Modem Software Download Configuration Settings (D4.0 CM only)

ServiceFlowErrorEntry.description: Service Flow Error Encoding reported when a service flow parameter is rejected

ErrorCode.description: Error code value (Confirmation Code per C.4)

ErroredParameter.description: Type value of the TLV in error

SnmpMibEntry.description: A single SNMP MIB object encoded as an OID, ASN.1 type, and value. Corresponds to TLV 11 (SNMP MIB Object) which carries a BER-encoded varbind in the binary config file.

oid.description: SNMP object identifier in dotted-decimal notation

type.description: ASN.1 type of the SNMP value

value.description: The SNMP value as a string representation appropriate for the given type

SnmpWriteAccessEntry.description: A single SNMP write-access control entry: an OID subtree with an access flag. Corresponds to TLV 10 which carries a BER-encoded OID followed by a 1-byte access flag in the binary config file.

oid.description: SNMP object identifier subtree in dotted-decimal notation

SshCommonConfigEntry.description: Common SSH Configuration File Settings sub-TLVs

SshEnabledInterfaces.description: SSH enabled interfaces bitmask (bit 0: network-facing private interfaces)

SshNewConnectionTimeout.description: SSH new connection timeout in seconds (0=SSH disabled)

SshSccaCertRevocationCheckDisable.description: Disable certificate revocation checks for SCCA TLS connection (0=do not proceed without rev info, non-zero=proceed)

SshSourceAddressRestrictions.description: Network/address specifier in CIDR notation limiting SSH connection sources

SshCmCds.description: Credential Data Structure (CDS) with SSH credentials (username/password or public key entries)

SshCmCdsDownloadUrl.description: URL where the CDS can be downloaded from

SshSccaRestApiUrl.description: URL where the SCCA REST API is implemented

UnsolicitedGrantTimeReference.description: Unsolicited grant time reference in microseconds

VendorSpecificContainer.description: Container for vendor-specific sub-TLVs at OUI-gated extension points

SubTlvs.description: Array of vendor-specific sub-TLVs in generic type/value form

VendorSpecificTlvEntry.description: A single vendor-specific sub-TLV as type number and hex-encoded value

dataType.description: Optional encoding hint for the value field. Used during encode to accept typed input.

value.description: Sub-TLV value as hex-encoded bytes. Decode always produces hex.

VplsClass.description: VPLS class name (STRING, 1-32 bytes; DPoE only)

CmMic.description: CM Message Integrity Check (MIC) - 16-byte HMAC-MD5 digest

CmtsMic.description: CMTS Message Integrity Check (MIC) - 16-byte HMAC-MD5 digest

CpeEthernetMacAddress.description: Ethernet MAC address of a CPE device allowed through the CM

DhqosAsfSidBundleAssignment.description: DHQoS ASF SID Bundle Assignment encoding

DocsisExtensionField.description: DOCSIS Extension Field (Vendor Specific / General Extension). Each entry begins with a VendorId (OUI). OUI=FFFFFF means General Extension with CANN-registered sub-TLVs; any other OUI is vendor-specific.

DownstreamFrequency.description: Center frequency of the downstream channel in Hz

DownstreamServiceFlow.description: Downstream Service Flow definitions. Each entry defines QoS parameters for one downstream service flow.

DtpModeConfiguration.description: DTP Mode Configuration: specifies the provisioned Downstream Topology Protocol (DTP) mode for a CM (0=reserved, 1=DTP Slave Mode, 2=DTP Master Mode)

Edva.description: eDVA (Embedded Digital Voice Adapter) configuration - opaque eSAFE encoding

Emta.description: eMTA (Embedded Multimedia Terminal Adapter) configuration - opaque eSAFE encoding

Eps.description: ePS (eSAFE Power Supply) configuration - opaque eSAFE encoding

Esg.description: eSG (Embedded Service Gateway) configuration - opaque eSAFE encoding

Estb.description: eSTB (Embedded Set-Top Box) configuration - opaque eSAFE encoding

FdxDownstreamUpperBandEdge.description: FDX Downstream Upper Band Edge frequency

MaxNumCpes.description: Maximum number of CPEs allowed behind this CM

MaximumNumberOfClassifiers.description: Maximum number of classifiers the CM supports

NetworkAccess.description: Controls whether the CM has network access (0 = disabled, 1 = enabled)

PrivacyEnable.description: Enable BPI+ privacy on the CM (0 = disabled, 1 = enabled)

SnmpCpeAccessControl.description: SNMP CPE access control (0 = disabled, 1 = enabled)

SnmpMibObject.description: SNMP MIB objects to set on the CM during provisioning. Each entry is a BER-encoded varbind in the binary config file.

SnmpWriteAccessControl.description: SNMP write access control: grants or denies SNMP SET access to OID subtrees. Each entry is a BER-encoded OID followed by a 1-byte access flag in the binary config file.

SubscriberMgmtControlMaxCpeIpv6Prefix.description: Subscriber Management Control maximum CPE IPv6 prefix count

SubscriberMgmtCpeIpv4List.description: Subscriber Management CPE IPv4 address list

SubscriberMgmtCpeIpv6List.description: Subscriber Management CPE IPv6 address list

SubscriberMgmtCpeIpv6PrefixList.description: Subscriber Management CPE IPv6 prefix list

SubscriberMgmtFilterGroups.description: Subscriber Management Filter Groups encoding (8 bytes)

SwUpgradeFilename.description: Filename for software upgrade via TFTP

SwUpgradeIpv4TftpServer.description: IPv4 address of the TFTP server for software upgrade

SwUpgradeIpv6TftpServer.description: IPv6 address of the TFTP server for software upgrade

TftpServerProvisionedModemIpv4Address.description: TFTP server provisioned modem IPv4 address

TftpServerProvisionedModemIpv6Address.description: TFTP server provisioned modem IPv6 address

TftpServerTimestamp.description: TFTP server timestamp for config file

UpstreamChannelId.description: Upstream channel ID for the CM to use during initial ranging

UpstreamServiceFlow.description: Upstream Service Flow definitions. Each entry defines QoS parameters for one upstream service flow.
